title: 谷歌推出 Nano Banana 2 模型，图像生成速度更快
content: 谷歌正在将 Nano Banana 2 设为 Gemini 应用程序和 AI 模式的默认模型。
original_title: Google launches Nano Banana 2 model with faster image generation
original_content: Google is making Nano Banana 2 a default model in Gemini app and in AI mode.

title: OpenAI 宣布大规模扩建伦敦办事处
content: 位于旧金山的人工智能实验室正在伦敦扩大其研究团队。此举使其与谷歌 DeepMind 直接竞争英国顶尖研究人才。
original_title: OpenAI Announces Major Expansion of London Office
original_content: The San Francisco-based AI lab is growing its research team in London. The move puts it in direct competition with Google DeepMind for top research talent in the UK.

title: Nano Banana 2：谷歌最新的AI图像生成模型
original_title: Nano Banana 2: Google's latest AI image generation model

title: 城市活力嵌入及其在交通预测中的应用
content:
arXiv:2602.21232v1 公告类型：新 
摘要：城市活力反映了城市空间内人类活动的动态，通常使用捕捉流动人口趋势的移动数据来衡量。这项研究提出了一种从实时浮动 p 中导出城市活力嵌入的新方法
original_title: Urban Vibrancy Embedding and Application on Traffic Prediction
original_content:
arXiv:2602.21232v1 Announce Type: new 
Abstract: Urban vibrancy reflects the dynamic human activity within urban spaces and is often measured using mobile data that captures floating population trends. This study proposes a novel approach to derive Urban Vibrancy embeddings from real-time floating p

title: 组正交化策略优化:作为希尔伯特空间正交投影的组策略优化
content:
arXiv:2602.21269v1 公告类型：新 
摘要：我们提出了组正交策略优化（GOPO），这是一种源自希尔伯特函数空间几何的大型语言模型的新对齐算法。而不是对概率单纯形进行优化并继承指数曲线
original_title: Group Orthogonalized Policy Optimization:Group Policy Optimization as Orthogonal Projection in Hilbert Space
original_content:
arXiv:2602.21269v1 Announce Type: new 
Abstract: We present Group Orthogonalized Policy Optimization (GOPO), a new alignment algorithm for large language models derived from the geometry of Hilbert function spaces. Instead of optimizing on the probability simplex and inheriting the exponential curva

title: 亲身体验 Nano Banana 2，Google 人工智能图像生成器的最新版本
content: 谷歌最新的图像模型 Nano Banana 2 是一款强大的 AI 照片编辑器，可以刺破现实。嗯，有时候。
original_title: Hands-On With Nano Banana 2, the Latest Version of Google’s AI Image Generator
original_content: Google’s latest image model, Nano Banana 2, is a powerful AI photo editor that punctures reality. Well, sometimes.

title: 据称 OpenClaw 用户正在绕过反机器人系统
content: 一个名为 Scrapling 的开源项目正在吸引人工智能代理用户，他们希望他们的机器人在未经许可的情况下抓取网站。
original_title: OpenClaw Users Are Allegedly Bypassing Anti-Bot Systems
original_content: An open source project called Scrapling is gaining traction with AI agent users who want their bots to scrape sites without permission.

title: Read AI 推出基于电子邮件的“数字孪生”，帮助您制定日程安排和答案
content: Read AI 正在推出 Ada，它可以回复您的空闲时间，并从公司知识库和网络中提取答案。
original_title: Read AI launches an email-based ‘digital twin’ to help you with schedules and answers
original_content: Read AI is launching Ada, which can reply with your availability and extract answers from the company knowledge base and the web.

title: 该公司声称在电池方面取得了突破。现在他们需要证明这一点。
content: 当一家公司声称已经创造了电池的圣杯时，肯定会出现一些问题。自从芬兰公司 Donut Lab 上个月宣布拥有一种新的固态电池技术，该技术已准备好大规模生产以来，人们的兴趣一直在升温
original_title: This company claims a battery breakthrough. Now they need to prove it.
original_content: When a company claims to have created what’s essentially the holy grail of batteries, there are bound to be some questions. Interest has been swirling since Donut Lab, a Finnish company, announced last month that it had a new solid-state battery technology, one that was ready for large-scale product

title: 动态对称点跟踪：解决模拟内存训练中的非理想参考
content:
arXiv:2602.21321v1 公告类型：新 
摘要：模拟内存计算（AIMC）直接在电阻交叉阵列内执行计算，为扩展大型视觉和语言模型提供了一个节能平台。然而，非理想的模拟设备特性使得AIMC的训练变得更加困难。
original_title: Dynamic Symmetric Point Tracking: Tackling Non-ideal Reference in Analog In-memory Training
original_content:
arXiv:2602.21321v1 Announce Type: new
